templates.name: 首封触达 - 中文
templates.subject: 关于香港合规交易渠道的一次简短交流
templates.body:
你好，我这边关注到 {{project_name}} 最近在 {{signal_summary}} 方面动作比较明显。

我有朋友在香港持牌合规交易平台 OSL 负责项目合作，最近也在看更适合进入香港及机构市场的项目。

从公开信息看，{{project_name}} 在 {{fit_reason}} 这几个点上和香港合规渠道的诉求有一定匹配度，所以想先简单了解一下：你们近期是否有以下方向的计划？
1. 扩展香港或亚洲市场
2. 建立更合规的二级流动性渠道
3. 接触机构投资者、托管或场外网络

如果有兴趣，我们可以先安排一个 15 分钟的非正式交流。我这边也可以先整理一版香港合规交易平台通常会关注的准备项，供你们内部评估。

祝好
{{sender_name}}

templates.name: First Outreach - English
templates.subject: Quick intro regarding Hong Kong compliant market access
templates.body:
Hi {{contact_name}},

We noticed that {{project_name}} has recently shown clear momentum around {{signal_summary}}.

A friend of mine works on project partnerships at OSL, a regulated exchange platform in Hong Kong, and is currently speaking with teams that may be exploring compliant market access and institutional-facing liquidity.

Based on public information, {{project_name}} seems potentially relevant because of {{fit_reason}}.

Would it be useful to have a brief 15-minute introductory chat to understand whether you are considering any of the following?
- Hong Kong or broader Asia expansion
- More compliant secondary market access
- Institutional distribution, custody, or OTC connectivity

Happy to share a short checklist of what Hong Kong compliant venues usually look for before any formal discussion.

Best,
{{sender_name}}
